title: Implement Workspace Boundaries
description: Utilize tools like `eslint-plugin-import` to enforce architectural boundaries within a monorepo workspace. Prevent circular dependencies and unauthorized layer-crossing (e.g., UI to backend) using build-time checks. Configure module boundary rules to maintain code hygiene and prevent anti-patterns in large monorepos.
objectives: Utilize tools like `eslint-plugin-import` to enforce architectural boundaries within a monorepo workspace.
Prevent circular dependencies and unauthorized layer-crossing (e.g., UI to backend) using build-time checks.
Configure module boundary rules to maintain code hygiene and prevent anti-patterns in large monorepos.
